summary: Tested iteration 2 features: bulk metadata editing, author pages, expanded stats. All 37 backend tests pass (17 regression in backend_test.py + 20 new in test_new_features.py). UI flows for Stats page, Author shelf, BookDetail author-link, Authors row on Dashboard, and BulkMetadataDialog work end-to-end. One bug found: CantFindOnline.saveUrl still auto-fires FicHub retry despite review request stating it should NOT.

ui_bugs.issue: After saving a corrected source URL, the page still auto-fires a FicHub retry (line 84: `await retry(bid, { silent: true });`). Per the review request, saving should NOT auto-fire retry — user should manually click the 'Retry FicHub' button.

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/CantFindOnline.jsx saveUrl(): remove the `await retry(bid, { silent: true });` line. After saving the corrected URL the UI should just keep the 'Retry FicHub' button visible — let the user click it. Update the toast from 'Source URL updated — trying FicHub…' to something like 'Source URL updated. Click Retry FicHub to try again.'
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2286 lines — consider splitting into routers per feature (auth, books, stats, authors) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Pre-existing F841/F541 lint warnings in server.py — not introduced this iteration, can be ignored as noted by main agent.

Bulk metadata endpoint correctly enforces auth (401 without token), validates body, and supports all documented operations (set author/category/fandom/series, clear fandom/series via empty string, sequential series_index with custom start, title prefix strip).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all new features work; CantFindOnline still auto-retries against requirement)

test_credentials: Seeded MongoDB user user_ui_20f82e65 (cleaned up post-test). For backend tests, the test_new_features.py creates its own seeded user with bearer-token session via direct MongoDB insertion (no UI registration needed).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests upload 3 generated EPUBs per session (cleaned up via module teardown). UI tests seeded 2 EPUBs (Hogwarts Tales by 'J.K. UI Tester' and Forks Diaries by 'S. UITester') for a temporary user (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new feature endpoints verified: GET /api/authors (with counts, excludes empty/Unknown), GET /api/authors/{name}, GET /api/stats/detailed (30 daily, 12 monthly, top_fandoms/authors/categories, books_total), POST /api/books/bulk/metadata (author/category/fandom/series/prefix operations all work including clearing via empty string and sequential series_index). UI: navbar-stats link, /library/stats with all 5 cards (daily-activity, top-fandoms, top-authors, monthly-finished, category-breakdown), /library/author/{name} with author-title/author-books-grid/author-search/back-to-library, BookDetail author-link, Dashboard open-author-<name> chips, SelectionBar bulk-edit-metadata-btn opens BulkMetadataDialog with all documented fields. The StatsCard view-detailed-stats link correctly only appears when overview has data (books_finished>0 or pages_read>0 or reading_streak_days>0) — not a bug. One remaining bug: CantFindOnline.saveUrl auto-fires retry against requirement.
rca_of_the_issue: CantFindOnline auto-retry: In /app/frontend/src/pages/CantFindOnline.jsx saveUrl() function (lines 77-88), after PATCH /api/books/{id}/source-url succeeds, the code calls `await retry(bid, { silent: true })` which immediately triggers a FicHub refresh. The review request explicitly states this should NOT happen — user should manually click the 'Retry FicHub' button (data-testid retry-<book_id>) which is already rendered. Mitigation: delete line 84 and update the success toast accordingly.
